goal: continue building without manual actions until completion or ecosystem-managed task handoff is capable

tasks.title: Install full staged source tree
tasks.done_when: src, tests, scripts, docs, and CI exist in live branch

tasks.title: Run managed completion verifier in CI
tasks.done_when: GitHub Actions verifies managed completion state

tasks.title: Open install PR with boundary statement
tasks.done_when: PR exists and states non-production boundary

tasks.title: Recalculate live repo delta
tasks.done_when: line 4 delta is recalculated from live branch file verification
